name: Discovery
description: Paste or attach discovery notes and I'll qualify the opportunity, draft a customer confirmation document, flag open questions, and prepare an SA handoff brief — all in one response.
starter_questions: Here are my notes from today's call with [Company] — [paste notes here]
I have a transcript from my call with [Company] — [attach file]
I just got off a call with [Company]. Here's what I captured: [paste notes]
